prompt: From the meeting notes below, extract a JSON object with EXACTLY these keys: meeting_title (string), meeting_date (ISO date YYYY-MM-DD), decision (string, the single explicit decision recorded, or null if none), action_items (array). Each action_items element is an object with EXACTLY: task (string, a concise imperative), owner (string first name, or null if no one is assigned), due_date (ISO date YYYY-MM-DD, or null if no date is given). Include ONLY concrete action items that were assigned to be done; do NOT include items explicitly marked 'No action' or mere discussion points. Resolve relative dates against the meeting date. Output ONLY the JSON object, no commentary. Use null wherever the notes are silent; do not invent an owner or a date.

inputs.name: notes.txt
inputs.content:
Product Sync - Notes
Date: Monday, 3 June 2024
Present: Dana (PM), Raj (eng lead), Meera (design), Tom (guest, sales)

Discussion:
- Dana confirmed the export feature ships in the June release. Decision made: v2 export ships in June, CSV only, no PDF for now.
- Raj will finalize the export API spec by Wednesday this week.
- The onboarding redesign mockups need a second review round; someone needs to own scheduling that - we'll sort the owner offline, no name assigned yet.
- Meera to deliver the updated icon set by next Monday.
- Tom raised that two enterprise customers asked about PDF export. Noted for the backlog. No action.

grading.guidance: Gold JSON: {"meeting_title":"Product Sync","meeting_date":"2024-06-03","decision":"v2 export ships in June, CSV only, no PDF for now","action_items":[{"task":"Finalize the export API spec","owner":"Raj","due_date":"2024-06-05"},{"task":"Own/schedule a second review round of the onboarding redesign mockups","owner":null,"due_date":null},{"task":"Deliver the updated icon set","owner":"Meera","due_date":"2024-06-10"}]}. Date resolution: meeting is Monday 2024-06-03, so 'Wednesday this week' = 2024-06-05 and 'next Monday' = 2024-06-10. Two deliberate traps: (1) the onboarding-mockups item has NO owner and NO date ('no name assigned yet') — owner and due_date MUST both be null, not a guessed name/date. (2) Tom's PDF-export remark is explicitly 'No action' and is a discussion/backlog note — it MUST NOT appear as an action item, and Tom (a sales guest) is never assigned a task. A 10 has exactly THREE action items, correct owners (Raj, null, Meera), correctly resolved dates (2024-06-05, null, 2024-06-10), the exact decision string, and excludes Tom's item. Heavily penalize inventing an owner or date for the mockups item, including Tom's 'No action' remark as a task, assigning Tom any task, missing an item, wrong date arithmetic, or prose outside the JSON.

calibrationAnchors.answer: {"meeting_title":"Product Sync","meeting_date":"2024-06-03","decision":null,"action_items":[{"task":"Finalize export API spec","owner":"Raj","due_date":"2024-06-04"},{"task":"Schedule mockup review","owner":"Dana","due_date":"2024-06-05"},{"task":"Deliver icon set","owner":"Meera","due_date":"2024-06-10"},{"task":"Follow up on PDF export for enterprise customers","owner":"Tom","due_date":null}]}
